# Verify that 'Depends on:' and 'Next:' lines appear
# in the PR navigation comments posted for a linear stack.

as 'Test <test@example.com>'
at '2024-04-05T16:40:32Z'

# setup
cd repo
git init
git commit --allow-empty -m 'Initial commit'

# set up a fake forge remote
shamhub init
shamhub new origin alice/example.git
shamhub register alice
git push origin main

# create a stack:
# main -> feat-a -> feat-b -> feat-c
git add feat-a.txt
gs branch create feat-a -m 'Add feat a'
git add feat-b.txt
gs branch create feat-b -m 'Add feat b'
git add feat-c.txt
gs branch create feat-c -m 'Add feat c'

env SHAMHUB_USERNAME=alice
gs auth login

# submit the entire stack.
gs stack submit --fill
stderr 'Created #1'
stderr 'Created #2'
stderr 'Created #3'

shamhub dump comments
cmp stdout $WORK/golden/comments.txt

-- repo/feat-a.txt --
This is feat a
-- repo/feat-b.txt --
This is feat b
-- repo/feat-c.txt --
This is feat c

-- golden/comments.txt --
- change: 1
  body: |
    This change is part of the following stack:

    - #1 ◀
        - #2
            - #3

    Next: #2

    <sub>Change managed by [git-spice](https://abhinav.github.io/git-spice/).</sub>
    <!-- gs:navigation comment -->
- change: 2
  body: |
    This change is part of the following stack:

    - #1
        - #2 ◀
            - #3

    Depends on: #1
    Next: #3

    <sub>Change managed by [git-spice](https://abhinav.github.io/git-spice/).</sub>
    <!-- gs:navigation comment -->
- change: 3
  body: |
    This change is part of the following stack:

    - #1
        - #2
            - #3 ◀

    Depends on: #2

    <sub>Change managed by [git-spice](https://abhinav.github.io/git-spice/).</sub>
    <!-- gs:navigation comment -->
